summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDF attachments support for Shared Project GPT app. All core PDF features are working correctly including file upload, project isolation, active file management, and AI integration with document context.
passed_tests: PDF file upload with text extraction and chunking
List files in project with proper metadata display
Set active files for chat context
Send message with file context - AI uses document content
Project isolation - files from different projects are isolated
Error handling for non-PDF files (proper rejection)
Error handling for image-based PDFs (no extractable text)
File panel UI shows uploaded files with metadata
Checkbox to toggle file active status (visual indication)
AI responses reference document content when files are active
File size and chunk count display
Collapsible file panel with proper toggle functionality

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major UI flows working, minor checkbox selector issue)
